description: Python script that imports PyYAML and calls yaml.load() — the vulnerable function for CVE-2020-14343 and CVE-2020-1747. Tree-sitter call-graph analysis confirms the vulnerable symbol is reachable from main.

findings.human_justification: yaml.load() is called in handler.py which is imported by main.py. Tree-sitter confirms the vulnerable function is reachable.
yaml.load() is called in handler.py which is imported by main.py. Tree-sitter confirms the vulnerable function is reachable.
